title: DFU - Disconnecting/connecting earbuds to check DFU Pop Up
scenario: Verify DFU pop-up appears when disconnecting and reconnecting earbuds during a software update
steps: 1. Connect both earbuds to the device.
2. Navigate to Software Update in the settings.
3. Tap Update to start the software update process.
4. Disconnect the right earbud and verify that a pop-up appears with the message: 'Update currently not available, please try back later'.
7. Disconnect the left earbud and verify that the same pop-up appears: 'Update currently not available, please try back later'.
expected: An appropriate pop-up with the message "Update currently not available, please try back later" appears each time an earbud is disconnected and persists until dismissed.
